en: We who are strong have an obligation to bear with the failings of the weak, and not to please ourselves.
zh: 我們堅強的人，應該擔當不堅強的人的軟弱，不應該求自己的喜悅。

en: Let each of us please his neighbor for his good, to build him up.
zh: 我們各人務要叫鄰舍喜悅，好讓他得到益處、得到造就。

en: For Christ did not please himself, but as it is written, "The reproaches of those who reproached you fell on me."
zh: 因為連基督也不求自己的喜悅；反而像經上所記的：“辱罵你的人的辱罵，都落在我的身上。”

en: For whatever was written in former days was written for our instruction, that through endurance and through the encouragement of the Scriptures we might have hope.
zh: 從前經上所寫的，都是為教訓我們而寫的，好使我們藉著忍耐和聖經中的安慰得著盼望。

en: May the God of endurance and encouragement grant you to live in such harmony with one another, in accord with Christ Jesus,
zh: 願賜忍耐和安慰的 神，使你們彼此同心，效法基督耶穌，

en: that together you may with one voice glorify the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ.
zh: 同心一致地榮耀我們主耶穌基督的父 神。

en: Therefore welcome one another as Christ has welcomed you, for the glory of God.
zh: 因此，你們應當彼此接納，就像基督接納了你們一樣，使榮耀歸於 神。

en: For I tell you that Christ became a servant to the circumcised to show God's truthfulness, in order to confirm the promises given to the patriarchs,
zh: 我說，基督為了 神的真理，成了受割禮的人的僕人，為的是要證實對祖先的應許，

en: and in order that the Gentiles might glorify God for his mercy. As it is written, "Therefore I will praise you among the Gentiles, and sing to your name."
zh: 使外族人因著所蒙的憐憫榮耀 神；如經上所記： “因此我要在列邦中稱讚你， 歌頌你的名。”

en: And again it is said, "Rejoice, O Gentiles, with his people."
zh: 又說： “列邦啊，當與他的子民一同快樂。”

en: And again, "Praise the Lord, all you Gentiles, and let all the peoples extol him."
zh: 又說： “萬國啊， 你們當讚美主； 願萬民都頌讚他。”

en: And again Isaiah says, "The root of Jesse will come, even he who arises to rule the Gentiles; in him will the Gentiles hope."
zh: 以賽亞也說： “將來必有耶西的根， 就是那興起來治理列邦的； 列邦都寄望於他。”

en: May the God of hope fill you with all joy and peace in believing, so that by the power of the Holy Spirit you may abound in hope.
zh: 願那賜盼望的 神，因著你們的信，把一切喜樂平安充滿你們，使你們靠著聖靈的大能滿有盼望。

en: I myself am satisfied about you, my brothers, that you yourselves are full of goodness, filled with all knowledge and able to instruct one another.
zh: 我的弟兄們，我個人深信你們自己也滿有良善，充滿豐富的知識，也能夠彼此勸導。

en: But on some points I have written to you very boldly by way of reminder, because of the grace given me by God
zh: 但有些地方，我寫得稍為大膽一點，是要提醒你們；我因著 神賜給我的恩典，

en: to be a minister of Christ Jesus to the Gentiles in the priestly service of the gospel of God, so that the offering of the Gentiles may be acceptable, sanctified by the Holy Spirit.
zh: 為外族人作了基督耶穌的僕役，作了 神福音的祭司，使所獻上的外族人得蒙悅納，靠著聖靈成為聖潔。

en: In Christ Jesus, then, I have reason to be proud of my work for God.
zh: 所以，在 神的事上，我在基督耶穌裡倒有可以引以為榮的。

en: For I will not venture to speak of anything except what Christ has accomplished through me to bring the Gentiles to obedience- by word and deed,
zh: 別的我不敢說，我只說基督藉著我所作的事，就是用言語行為，藉著神蹟和奇事的大能，以及聖靈的大能，使外族人順服；這樣，我從耶路撒冷直到以利里古，把基督的福音都傳開了。

en: by the power of signs and wonders, by the power of the Spirit of God- so that from Jerusalem and all the way around to Illyricum I have fulfilled the ministry of the gospel of Christ;
and thus I make it my ambition to preach the gospel, not where Christ has already been named, lest I build on someone else's foundation,
zh: 我立定主意，不在宣揚過基督的地方傳福音，免得建立在別人的根基上，

en: but as it is written, "Those who have never been told of him will see, and those who have never heard will understand."
zh: 反而照經上所記： “那對他一無所聞的，將要看見； 那沒有聽過的，將要明白。”

en: This is the reason why I have so often been hindered from coming to you.
zh: 因此，我多次受到攔阻，不能到你們那裡去。

en: But now, since I no longer have any room for work in these regions, and since I have longed for many years to come to you,
zh: 但現在這一帶再沒有可傳的地方，而我多年來又很想去見你們，

en: I hope to see you in passing as I go to Spain, and to be helped on my journey there by you, once I have enjoyed your company for a while.
zh: 所以，無論我甚麼時候到西班牙去，都希望趁我路過時和你們見面，先稍微滿足我的心願，然後由你們給我送行到那裡去。

en: At present, however, I am going to Jerusalem bringing aid to the saints.
zh: 不過，我現在為了供應聖徒的事要往耶路撒冷去；

en: For Macedonia and Achaia have been pleased to make some contribution for the poor among the saints at Jerusalem.
zh: 因為馬其頓和亞該亞人樂意捐了一些錢，給耶路撒冷聖徒中的窮人。

en: They were pleased to do it, and indeed they owe it to them. For if the Gentiles have come to share in their spiritual blessings, they ought also to be of service to them in material blessings.
zh: 他們是樂意的，而且那也是他們的本分 ，因為外族人既然分享了猶太人屬靈的好處，就應該供應他們肉身的需要。

en: When therefore I have completed this and have delivered to them what has been collected, I will leave for Spain by way of you.
zh: 等我辦好這件事，把這筆款項安全地交了給他們，我就要路過你們那裡到西班牙去。

en: I know that when I come to you I will come in the fullness of the blessing of Christ.
zh: 我知道我到你們那裡去的時候，一定會帶著基督豐盛的福分。

en: I appeal to you, brothers, by our Lord Jesus Christ and by the love of the Spirit, to strive together with me in your prayers to God on my behalf,
zh: 弟兄們，我靠著我們的主耶穌基督，憑著聖靈的慈愛，勸你們和我一同竭力為我向 神祈禱，

en: that I may be delivered from the unbelievers in Judea, and that my service for Jerusalem may be acceptable to the saints,
zh: 求 神救我脫離猶太地不信從的人，使我帶到耶路撒冷的捐款，可以得到聖徒的悅納；

en: so that by God's will I may come to you with joy and be refreshed in your company.
zh: 也使我照著 神的旨意，高高興興地到你們那裡去，好和你們一同得到安息。

en: May the God of peace be with you all. Amen.
zh: 願賜平安的 神與你們眾人同在。阿們。
